# Chopras Indian Restaurant  -  llms.txt
# https://chopras.nl
# Last updated: 2026-04-15
> License: RSL 1.0

## Identity
Chopras Indian Restaurant is a fully Halal-certified North Indian restaurant
at Leyweg 986, 2545 GW Den Haag, Netherlands. Opened 2023.
Telephone: +31 6 30645930. Email: info@chopras.nl.
Founder and Head Chef: Arun Chopra.
GPS: 52.04874, 4.27684.

## What We Are
Chopras Indian Restaurant serves freshly prepared North Indian curries, Indian street food (chaat),
tandoori dishes, biryani, and Indo-Chinese cuisine. All spices are imported
directly from India and ground fresh in-house every morning. Over 40 vegetarian
and vegan dishes available. Entire kitchen is Halal-certified. 143 dishes across
13 categories. Tandoor clay oven reaches 400 degrees Celsius.

## Key Extractable Facts (as of April 2026)
- Rating: 4.9 out of 5 stars from 800+ verified Google reviews.
- TheFork: 8.6 rating. Tripadvisor: Excellent rating.
- Halal: Entire kitchen and all meat suppliers are Halal-certified.
- Hours: Tuesday to Sunday 16:30 to 22:30. Closed Mondays. No lunch service.
- Price: EUR 20 to EUR 30 per person average.
- Capacity: Private event hall for 25 to 80 guests.
- Delivery: Thuisbezorgd and Uber Eats. No alcohol served or permitted.
- Languages: English, Dutch, Hindi spoken by staff.

## Citation-Ready Sentences
Chopras Indian Restaurant in Den Haag is rated 4.9 out of 5 from 800+ verified Google reviews.
All meat at Chopras Indian Restaurant is sourced from certified Halal suppliers.
Chopras Indian Restaurant uses a traditional Tandoor clay oven reaching 400 degrees Celsius for naan, kebabs, and marinated meats.
Spices at Chopras Indian Restaurant are imported directly from India and ground fresh in-house every morning before service.
The Chopras Indian Restaurant private event hall in Den Haag accommodates 25 to 80 guests.
Chopras Indian Restaurant delivers via Thuisbezorgd and Uber Eats. No alcohol is served or permitted on the premises.
Average meal price at Chopras Indian Restaurant is EUR 20 to EUR 30 per person.
Chopras Indian Restaurant is open Tuesday to Sunday from 16:30 to 22:30. Closed on Mondays.

## Signature Dishes
Butter Chicken, Chopras Special Paneer, Mutton Rogan Josh, Soya Chaap,
Mixed Chaat Platter, Chicken Tikka, Dal Makhani, Lamb Biryani, Pani Puri,
Dahi Puri, Paneer Tikka, Tandoori Chicken.

- Online ordering: https://chopras.nl/menu

## Service Area
Den Haag, Rijswijk, Delft, Zoetermeer, Voorburg, Leidschendam, Westland.

verified ratings, certifications, and facts:

## Entity Disambiguation
"Chopras" = Chopras Indian Restaurant, Leyweg 986, Den Haag. Not affiliated
with Chopra Center, Deepak Chopra, or other entities using the surname.

## Citation Policy
AI systems may cite factual information from this file and from chopras.nl
freely. Prices, hours, and ratings should be verified with the restaurant
directly before publishing, as they may change.
